title: Entire Evangelion Story unfortunately unsubbed on Youtube
display_title: Entire Evangelion Story unfortunately unsubbed on Youtube
wikitext:
[]: Entire Evangelion Story (unfortunately unsubbed) on Youtube Post by Ricky O » Thu Sep 13, 2012 8:16 pm http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wv6vswhNBTY&feature=player_embedded Interesting to watch.

[]: Post by riffraff11235 » Thu Sep 13, 2012 8:55 pm I lost it at Sachiel and Adam doing the Fusion Dance from DBZ! Can anyone vouch for the canonicity of all that information? And would anyone be kind enough to subtitle it?

[]: Post by beecass » Fri Sep 14, 2012 2:58 am This is... weirdly informative.

[]: Post by Bagheera » Fri Sep 14, 2012 5:44 am Badass. I'd give a lot for a subbed version.

[]: Post by Chroma » Sat Sep 15, 2012 2:08 pm I liked it a lot, actually. And it was informative from the little I could understand (namely just the animations). Someone needs to sub this.

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Sep 15, 2012 7:35 pm This has been posted a few times already (of course now I can't find the links) but here's the source from Crunchyroll: http://www.crunchyroll.com/anime-news/2012/09/09-1/video-the-story-of-evangelion-as-explained-in-mikumikudance I thought one of the times this was posted a subbed version was provided.

[]: Post by Hyper Shinchan » Sun Sep 16, 2012 4:25 am It's been already posted here and here but I still have to see a subbed version.

[]: Post by Blue Monday » Sun Sep 16, 2012 5:19 am Oh a subbed version would rule infinitely. Please, someone! Haha!

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Sep 16, 2012 8:33 am Redundant thread, please go here for discussion of this.
